name: pl.cenogram/mcp-server
title: Cenogram — Polish Real Estate Data
description: Access 7M+ Polish real estate transactions from RCN government open data. Search by location, address, parcel ID, GPS coordinates, or polygon. Compare districts side-by-side.

environmentVariables.name: CENOGRAM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from cenogram.pl/api (free, email registration)
